Hola desde Django

# C0684 · REST CRUD JSON (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE)
# Django: ver settings.py / urls.py / views.py / middleware.py.
overrides.C0685:
# C0685 · Middleware timing
import time
class TimingMiddleware:
    def __init__(self, get_response): self.get_response = get_response
    def __call__(self, request):
        t0 = time.time()
        response = self.get_response(request)
        ms = (time.time()-t0)*1000
        print(request.method, request.path, round(ms), "ms")
        return response
